product: Genie conversation API and prompt matching
tagline: Easier to understand audit events in Genie: The updateConversationMessageFeedback audit event now includes a feedback rating field to quickly see whether a rating is positive or negative.
what_it_does: Easier to understand audit events in Genie: The updateConversationMessageFeedback audit event now includes a feedback rating field to quickly see whether a rating is positive or negative. Genie Conversations API in Public Preview: The Genie Conversation API is now in Public Preview. Use the API to ask questions, retrieve generated SQL and query results, or get the details associated with a Genie Space.
why_it_matters: Genie prompt matching is now available in Public Preview: Prompt matching (previously data sampling) improves Genie's ability to translate user prompts into the right column and row values.
key_takeaway: Easier to understand audit events in Genie: The updateConversationMessageFeedback audit event now includes a feedback rating field to quickly see whether a rating is positive or negative.
